backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core data types (Membership, PublishingWork, Release, RecordingProject, ArtistDevelopment) and integrating authorization, access control, and user approval components for the Higgins Music Hub backend canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three high-confidence features focused on diagnosing and fixing portal layout rendering, TanStack Router route tree auditing, and PortalLayout Outlet verification following the Version 36 deployment regression.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Aggregated one-line summaries of all frontend source files, covering React Query hooks, related-record components, entity detail pages, and upgrade-safe array normalization utilities.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, sidebar, chart, and destructive colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Higgins Music app that mounts a root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/ROLL_OUT_21_7_EXECUTION_LOG.md: Timestamped execution log for Rollout 21.7 (Step 9.5) recording pre-deployment checks including TypeScript compilation, production build, Motoko compilation, canister upgrade, and post-upgrade verification steps.
frontend/ROLL_OUT_21_7_STEP_9_5_ARTIFACT: Companion artifact storage document for the Rollout 21.7 execution log, intended to hold verbatim command outputs and build logs that are too long for the main log file.
frontend/ROLLOUT_STEPS.md: Single source of truth document enumerating completed rollout steps (1–9.5) and remaining steps (10–12) covering mainnet deployment, post-launch refinements, and long-term maintenance with acceptance criteria for each.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_1_21_2.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for Rollout 21.1–21.2 covering landing page load, authentication flow, all five portal detail routes, Edit Links dialogs, and non-admin member access verification.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_3_21_4.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.3–21.4 of the Higgins Music Hub, covering landing page load, authentication, all five portal detail routes, and Edit Links dialogs for both admin and non-admin approved member roles.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_5_21_6.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.5–21.6, structurally identical to the 21.3–21.4 checklist, verifying landing page, auth, five detail routes, and Edit Links dialogs for admin and non-admin roles.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_7_SESSION_LOG.md: Structured session log template for the rollout 21.7 smoke test, capturing test date, environment, admin and non-admin principal IDs, entity IDs per route, and per-step pass/fail results.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_7.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.7, adding explicit AuthGate/ApprovalGate verification steps and requiring the test to be run twice (once per role), with a companion session log for recording entity IDs and console output.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_STEP_10_MAINNET.md: Comprehensive post-deployment smoke test checklist for the ICP mainnet Step 10 release, covering landing page, authentication flows, all five portal detail routes, and Edit Links dialogs for both admin and non-admin roles with fields for recording deployment info and entity IDs.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application file that configures TanStack Router with all portal and admin routes, wraps the app in QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Toaster providers, and sets up authentication-gated navigation.
frontend/src/components/admin/PortalAudi: Admin-only component that displays a grouped, prioritized summary of incomplete or empty portal sections using audit findings data, rendered as cards with badge indicators.
frontend/src/components/auth/ApprovalGat: Approval gate component that is temporarily bypassed to always render children unconditionally, with the original approval-check logic preserved in comments for easy reversion.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Authentication guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the landing page and shows a loading spinner while Internet Identity is initializing or logging in.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component that handles Internet Identity login and logout, clearing the React Query cache on sign-out and displaying appropriate labels based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, email, and bio, then saves the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/feedback/AccessD: Centered card component that displays an access-denied message with a shield icon and a prompt to contact an administrator.
frontend/src/components/feedback/EmptySt: Reusable empty-state UI component that displays an optional icon, title, description, and an optional action button centered on the page.
frontend/src/components/feedback/ErrorBa: Renders a destructive alert banner with user-friendly error messages, converting backend 'Unauthorized' and 'not found' errors into readable text.
frontend/src/components/feedback/Loading: Displays a full-screen centered skeleton loading placeholder with multiple skeleton rows.
frontend/src/components/feedback/Section: Renders a dashed-border placeholder card indicating unbuilt portal sections, styled by priority level (high/medium/low) with an icon and badge.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandHead: Sticky top header with the Higgins Music logo/brand name that navigates to home on click, with an optional login button.
frontend/src/components/layout/PortalLay: Main portal layout with a sidebar navigation that filters admin-only items based on user role, handles logout, and renders child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/related/EditLink: Simple outline button component with a link icon used to trigger an edit-links action.
frontend/src/components/related/EditRela: Modal dialog for editing cross-entity relationships (members, artists, works, releases, projects) using multi-select lists, with loading and error states.
frontend/src/components/related/MultiSel: Filterable scrollable checklist component for selecting multiple entities by ID from a labeled list of options.
frontend/src/components/related/relatedR: Utility functions that determine edit permissions for various record types by comparing the caller's principal to the record owner, with admin override and defensive error handling.
frontend/src/components/related/RelatedR: Displays linked related records (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects) as clickable badges, resolving IDs to human-readable labels for non-admin users.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Custom hook that fetches the current user's role and approval status from the backend actor, exposing convenience flags like isAdmin and isApproved.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider component and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkableEntityOpti: Custom hook that builds dropdown option lists for linkable entities (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects), fetching all records for admins or only caller-owned records for regular users.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend data fetching and mutations, covering user profiles, roles, memberships, publishing works, releases, recording projects, and artist development entities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives and defines a warm neutral CSS custom property color palette for both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page displaying a hero section with sign-in button, a services overview grid, and a co-operative membership description, redirecting authenticated users to the portal.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/AdminBoo: Displays instructions for bootstrapping the first admin account by navigating to the app with a secret token in the URL hash. Admin guard is temporarily disabled for testing.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/AdminDas: Admin dashboard showing counts and recent activity across memberships, publishing works, releases, recording projects, and artist development entries. Admin guard is temporarily disabled for testing.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/RoleAssi: Admin page for viewing all known users and assigning or changing their roles (admin, member, guest) via a dropdown table. Admin guard is temporarily disabled for testing.
frontend/src/pages/portal/artists/Artist: Detail view for a single artist development entry, displaying goals, plans, milestones, and related records, with an edit dialog for updating linked entities if the user has permission.
List page for artist development entries, showing all entries for admins or only the caller's entries for regular users, with a dialog to create new entries.
frontend/src/pages/portal/label/ReleaseD: Detail view for a single release record, displaying tracklist, key dates, workflow checklist, owners, and related entities, with an edit dialog for updating linked records if the user has permission.
frontend/src/pages/portal/label/Releases: Displays a list of music releases (all releases for admins, caller's releases otherwise) in a table with title, type, track count, and creation date. Includes a dialog to create new releases with a title and type field.
frontend/src/pages/portal/memberships/Me: Detail view for a single membership profile, allowing owners and admins to edit profile fields (name, email) and status, and manage related entity links via dialogs. Fetches membership data and linkable entity options, and renders related records sections.

Lists membership profiles in a table (all profiles for admins, caller's own for regular users) with status badges and creation dates. Provides a dialog to create new membership profiles with name and email fields.
frontend/src/pages/portal/publishing/Pub: Detail view for a single publishing work showing contributors, ownership splits, and linked entities, with inline notes editing and a related-records dialog for linking members, artists, releases, and projects. Permissions are checked via identity and admin role before allowing edits.

Lists publishing works in a table (all works for admins, caller's works otherwise) with title, registration status, contributor count, and creation date. Includes a dialog to create new publishing works with a title and registration status field.
frontend/src/pages/portal/recordings/Rec: Detail page for a single recording project, displaying metadata and related entities (members, artists, works, releases) with permission-gated editing via a link dialog.
List page for recording projects showing all (admin) or caller-owned projects in a table, with a dialog to create new projects.
frontend/src/utils/arrays.ts: Utility functions for safe array normalization (handling undefined/null backend values), including helpers for length checks and non-empty detection.
frontend/src/utils/portalAudit.ts: Centralized registry of audit findings (missing/incomplete features) across portal sections, used by placeholder components and the admin dashboard audit summary.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Validates ownership split arrays, ensuring at least one entry exists and the total percentage does not exceed 100%.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens (colors via OKLCH, fonts, border radius, shadows, animations) and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
frontend/UPGRADE_LINKING_VERIFICATION_RE: Manual QA checklist document for smoke-testing upgrade-safe related-record linking across five entity detail pages, covering build status, authentication flow, portal routes, and edit links dialogs for multiple rollout phases.
frontend/UPGRADE_LINKING_VERIFICATION.md: Manual QA verification checklist for post-canister-upgrade related-record linking across all five portal detail pages, testing Edit Links dialog behavior, save persistence after page refresh, and correct entity scoping for admin vs. non-admin members.
project_state.json: Tracks the state of the Higgins Music Hub project, documenting a critical bug where the portal shows no sections after a Version 36 deployment, along with three fix-focused features targeting route tree auditing, PortalLayout rendering, and section visibility for authenticated users.
